full_description: Find the target object and place it into the bread basket on the double-layer fan table.
schema: {A} denotes the target object, {B} denotes the bread basket, {a} denotes the arm that moves the object
preference: num of words should not exceed 20
seen: Pick up {A}, then put it in {B}.
Place the object into the bread basket.
Search for {B}, then place {A} inside it.
unseen: Drop the object into the bread basket.
